title: Power Integrations (POWI) Stock Forecast & Analyst Price Targets
text: Analyst consensus on Power Integrations shows strong bullish sentiment with 4 Buy ratings, 1 Hold rating, and 0 Sell ratings among analysts covering the stock. The median analyst price target is $53.00, ranging from $45.00 to $56.00. Susquehanna recently raised its price target to $85 from $70 with a Buy rating. Deutsche Bank raised its price target to $65 from $45. The overall analyst rating is Strong Buy (9.2/10) based on consensus ratings. Sell-side analysts expect revenue to grow 9.5% over the next 12 months, though this projection implies growth below the semiconductor industry average of 17%. Q1 2026 performance showed strong outperformance: revenue of $108.3 million beat analyst estimates of $106.6 million by 1.6%, adjusted EPS of $0.25 beat estimates of $0.23 by 11%, and adjusted operating income of $12.65 million beat estimates of $11 million by 15%. Q2 2026 guidance for revenue of $117.5 million at the midpoint was 2.2% above analyst consensus estimates. The stock has shown significant strength recently, rising 34% over the past month and 60% over the past three months, driven by earnings beats and strategic announcements.
